name_en: [Variant Chip Version] Model: M46895 Mini. This Nano Alma handbag condenses the classic Alma silhouette, outlined in leather with Monogram Dune canvas for the 2024 Spring/Summer runway. Exquisite handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap allow for multiple carrying styles. 18 x 12 x 8 cm (Length x Height x Width)
